hooks.command: CMD=$("/c/Users/IronLab/AppData/Roaming/uv/tools/graphifyy/Scripts/python.exe" -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',d).get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null || true); case "$CMD" in *grep*|*rg\ *|*ripgrep*|*find\ *|*fd\ *|*ack\ *|*ag\ *)   [ -f graphify-out/graph.json ] &&   echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"graphify: knowledge graph at graphify-out/. For focused questions, run `graphify query \"<question>\"` (scoped subgraph, usually much smaller than GRAPH_REPORT.md) instead of grepping raw files. Read GRAPH_REPORT.md only for broad architecture context."}}'   || true ;; esac

FILE=$("/c/Users/IronLab/AppData/Roaming/uv/tools/graphifyy/Scripts/python.exe" -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null || true); case "$FILE" in */specs/*|*/project-board/*|*/n8n/*|*/CLAUDE.md|*/README.md|*/CHANGELOG.md|*/docs/*)   [ -d graphify-out ] && echo "$FILE" >> graphify-out/.needs_update 2>/dev/null || true ;; esac
if [ -s graphify-out/.needs_update ]; then : > graphify-out/.needs_update; graphify update . >/dev/null 2>&1; fi
